stemHtml:
An aircraft maintains a constant indicated altitude of 6 500 ft from A (600 ft AMSL - QNH 1012 hPa) to B (930 ft AMSL - QNH 977 hPa). Assuming that the altimeter subscale setting remains unchanged at 1012 hPa, the height of the aircraft above the surface at B are:
(Barometric lapse rate: 27 ft/hPa)
